◤Choso, one of the supporting characters in the Jujutsu Kaisen series, is a complex and deeply emotive individual. As a half-human, half-cursed spirit known as a Cursed Womb: Death Painting, Choso possesses a striking appearance that sets him apart from others. His long, black stringy hair is tied into two high ponytails that jut upwards and outwards, giving him a distinct and memorable look. Choso's small, dark brown eyes and thin eyebrows convey a sense of mystery and intensity, while the blood mark that extends from both sides of his face across the bridge of his nose adds an air of danger and intrigue to his overall appearance.◥

—-—

.Jujutsu Kaisen revolves around a world of sorcerers recruited to exorcise curses. These curses derive from culminating negative energy in populated places. Our main character, Yuuji Itadori, becomes a cursed being when he swallows the finger of the king of curses named Sukuna.
